records.question: Which parties have addresses located exactly in Colorado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Colorado'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id 
FROM Parties AS parties 
JOIN Party_Addresses AS party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id 
JOIN Addresses AS addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id 
WHERE addresses.state_province_county = 'Colorado'

records.question: Who are the parties with the email alanna.boehm@example.net and phone 529-074-5348 that use Cheque as their payment method and have a Residence address valid since at least 2016-05-24 08:11:04 and ending exactly on 2018-03-04 08:34:45?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
WHERE party_addresses.date_address_from >= '2016-05-24 08:11:04' AND parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net' AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence' AND party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque' AND parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id
FROM Parties AS parties
JOIN Party_Addresses AS party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
WHERE parties.party_email = 'alanna.boehm@example.net'
  AND parties.party_phone = '529-074-5348'
  AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
  AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'Residence'
  AND party_addresses.date_address_from <= '2016-05-24 08:11:04'
  AND (party_addresses.date_address_to IS NULL OR party_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-04 08:34:45')

records.question: Which parties paid by Cheque and made a booking on or after 2018-03-24 22:12:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id FROM parties
JOIN party_services ON parties.party_id = party_services.customer_id
JOIN services ON party_services.service_id = services.service_id
WHERE party_services.booking_made_date >= '2018-03-24 22:12:30' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT parties.party_id 
FROM Parties AS parties 
JOIN Party_Services AS booking ON parties.party_id = booking.customer_id 
WHERE parties.payment_method_code = 'Cheque' 
AND booking.service_datetime >= '2018-03-24 22:12:30'

JOIN party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id
JOIN addresses ON party_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE party_addresses.date_address_from <= '2016-12-21 03:54:15' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Louisiana' AND addresses.line_1_number_building = '90236 Kunze Pass' AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' AND addresses.country = 'USA' AND party_addresses.date_address_to <= '2018-02-25 07:34:22' AND parties.party_phone = '1-950-874-1693x65923' AND parties.party_email = 'daniel.charity@example.net'

JOIN Party_Addresses party_addresses ON parties.party_id = party_addresses.party_id 
WHERE parties.party_phone = '1-950-874-1693x65923' 
AND parties.party_email = 'daniel.charity@example.net' 
AND parties.payment_method_code = 'Credit Card' 
AND party_addresses.address_type_code = 'address' 
AND party_addresses.date_address_from <= '2016-12-21'

    AND addresses.country = 'USA' 
    AND addresses.address_id = party_addresses.address_id
)

records.question: Which parties with the email noe.ziemann@example.org received a Health service named Welfare that involved the SSN Application form numbered 8069 and described as Form for SSN Application?

JOIN services ON party_services.service_id = services.service_id

WHERE services.service_type_code = 'Health' AND services.service_name = 'Welfare' AND forms.form_name = 'SSN Application' AND forms.form_number = '8069' AND forms.form_description = 'Form for SSN Application' AND parties.party_email = 'noe.ziemann@example.org'

JOIN Services AS services ON party_services.service_id = services.service_id
JOIN Party_Forms AS party_forms ON parties.party_id = party_forms.party_id
JOIN Forms AS forms ON party_forms.form_id = forms.form_id
WHERE parties.party_email = 'noe.ziemann@example.org' 
  AND services.service_name = 'Welfare'
